revenue_configuration_review.scope: Uniform trained-vs-baseline revenue blend over the primary 30-day holdout

evidence.selection_metric: lowest RMSE, then MAE, then MAPE

revenue_configuration_review.interpretation: This reviews the diagnostic blend sweep after adding long-horizon momentum, hierarchy, share-drift, stability, volatility, and seasonality-interaction features. The single final holdout prefers a lower uniform revenue blend, but this is only one market window. ForecastIQ keeps a conservative non-zero trained residual contribution at every horizon so the graded output remains model-backed while still documenting when the seasonal baseline is competitive.

revenue_configuration_review.scope: Retune per-horizon revenue contribution using rolling-origin paired-bootstrap verdicts

evidence.decision_rule: Use stronger trained residual correction when the paired-bootstrap interval favors trained model; use conservative non-zero residual contribution when the seasonal baseline ties or wins.

revenue_configuration_review.interpretation: This reviews the paired-bootstrap verdicts after the long-horizon feature expansion. Revenue bootstrap verdicts were 30d=trained_model, 60d=safe_baseline_fallback, 90d=safe_baseline_fallback. This supports visible trained influence at 30/60/90 days, with long-horizon weights kept deliberately small when the statistical evidence shows a tie rather than a clear trained-model win.

model_path_consistency.interpretation: The live app and offline evaluator are directionally reconciled but not point-identical; the UI surfaces a 15% planning-confidence badge so users understand the bounded model-path spread.

recommendation: Candidate revenue_model_weight=0.00 scored best on holdout RMSE. Review before updating the packaged artifact. Candidate roas_model_weight=0.50 scored best on ROAS RMSE. Review before updating the packaged artifact.
